programme.title: Gone in 60 Seconds
programme.desc: A former thief (Nicolas Cage) must agree to steal 50 cars in one night to save his brother (Giovanni Ribisi) from being killed by a vehicle smuggler.

programme.title: Doctor Strange
programme.desc: After a terrible accident, Dr. Stephen Strange (Benedict Cumberbatch) loses his ability to operate but finds new purpose when a mystical being known as the Ancient One reveals that Dr. Strange is the newly designated Sorcerer Supreme.

programme.title: Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness
programme.desc: With help from old and new allies, Dr. Stephen Strange travels into the multiverse to face a mysterious adversary.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse
programme.desc: After reuniting with Gwen Stacy, Brooklyn's full-time, friendly neighborhood Spider-Man is catapulted across the Multiverse, where he encounters a team of Spider-People charged with protecting its very existence.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming
programme.desc: Under the watchful eye of mentor Tony Stark, high school student Peter Parker starts to embrace his newfound identity as Spider-Man to battle the evil Vulture.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Far From Home
programme.desc: Spider-Man teams up with Nick Fury and fellow superhero Mysterio to stop four massive elemental creatures -- each representing Earth, air, water and fire -- from wreaking havoc across Europe.

programme.title: Silent Night

programme.title: Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone
